title: Holy Grail with Flex Shorthand
description: Build a holy grail layout using only the `flex` shorthand. Header/footer: `flex: none`, nav/aside: `flex: 0 0 200px`, main: `flex: 1`.
hint: Use flex shorthand values for each region.

title: Flex Value Identification
description: Create 4 items. Item 1: `flex: none`, Items 2-3: `flex: 1`, Item 4: `flex: 2`. Observe the sizing behavior.
hint: Apply the values and note how items 1 stays at content size, 2-3 share equally, 4 gets double.
